about_intro: Liyan Amiri Academy was founded in 2015 with the mission of 'advancing the level of knowledge' and the motto 'knowledge is the foundation of human progress.' It is a charitable and supportive institution focused on improving the educational and scientific level of underprivileged individuals, striving to provide equal learning opportunities for all. The academy's learning platform allows students to access educational courses for free or with the academy's financial support.
about_edu_p1: Firmly believing that education is a right for everyone, Liyan Amiri Academy has designed special support programs for underprivileged individuals. Students who cannot afford educational courses can receive them for free after registering and receiving approval from the academy's support committee.
about_edu_p2: This learning platform is designed to provide easy access to scientific and skill-based content so that no one is deprived of the opportunity to learn due to a lack of resources. The academy believes that knowledge has no borders and should be accessible to all.
about_community_p1: Liyan Amiri Academy is more than just an educational resource — it is a human community where members support each other on the path to growth. Instructors, volunteers, and graduates of the academy work hand in hand to elevate the scientific level of society.
about_community_p2: If you have any questions or uncertainties while watching courses, the academy's support team is ready to help. Our goal is to ensure that every student can receive educational content with the best quality and in complete comfort.
terms_intro: On this page you can view the terms of use for Liyan Amiri Academy's educational website.
terms_account_intro: Most of Liyan 's features are available to its members. If you intend to use this type of content, you must first register on the Liyan  website. Having an account requires compliance with the following rules:
terms_account_item1: You are required to enter all information correctly and accurately when registering on the site, including your email address.
terms_account_item2: If another person gains access to your account information without your permission, please report it to us immediately.
terms_account_item3: Do not share your username or password with third parties, as you are responsible for all activity related to your account.
terms_account_item4: Each account may only be used by one person. If multiple people use the same account, Liyan  reserves the right to suspend that account.
terms_account_item5: Using any fake or fraudulent name or invalid email for potential misuse or violation of others' rights will result in account suspension.
terms_account_item6: You may not conceal or misrepresent your identity or geographic location. You may not impersonate another person.
terms_privacy_intro: Privacy is very important to most people today, and it is equally important to us. At Liyan , we strive to create a safe environment for your activities by protecting your privacy.
terms_privacy_body: Information we collect from you during registration or profile updates is kept confidential at Liyan  and will not be shared with any third party individual or entity, except where required by law or competent authorities.
terms_feedback_intro: If any of the following are found in the comments or discussions created by you, they will be removed, and repeated violations will result in your account being closed:
terms_feedback_item1: Publishing false, misleading, deceptive, obscene, or socially inappropriate content
terms_feedback_item2: Any insult to third parties or invasion of their privacy
terms_feedback_item4: Personal or sensitive information of third parties
terms_moderation_body: Liyan  reserves the right to edit, remove, or prevent the publication of content created by users or content creators on the service that does not comply with the site's rules. We at Liyan  strive to maintain healthy content free from any insults.
terms_violation_body: In the event of non-compliance with the rules stated on this page, Liyan  reserves the right to immediately suspend or permanently terminate your access to the website and block your account (or part of it).
